metadata.title: Verified Execution, Mutation, Completion, Commit, and P45-Ready Artifact Safety
metadata.description: PlanSpec v5 alpha2 example with strict schema, risk-tiered command policy, runtime grants, enforcement registry, and real validation cases.

notes: v4.1.1 adapter compiles to executable lock.

mission.text: Implement P44 as a verified completion and safety foundation. Compile PlanSpec JSON to PlanLock before execution.

hardRequirements.text: Write/edit operations must pass WriteGate or SmartMutationEngine.
Final validation must use exact allowed commands.

antiPatterns.text: Do not create a module and leave it unwired.
Do not hide machine-critical behavior in prose.
Do not parse generated Markdown preview for execution.

operatorNotes.text: Human preview is generated from JSON and non-authoritative.
Spec changes after locking require new lock or approved amendment.

waves.title: Foundation
waves.description: AC schema, EvidenceLedger, and Worker Report Contract.

waves.title: Gate Core
waves.description: CompletionGate v2, terminal reconciler, and negative scanner.

waves.title: Bridge
waves.description: v4.1.1-compatible template extension and P45 bridge outputs.

instructions.text: Define stable acceptance criterion IDs, levels, evidence requirements, and validation references.
Acceptance criteria must be referenced by evidence items and completion gates using explicit stable IDs.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Stable AC schema exists
acceptanceCriteria.text: AcceptanceCriterion validates id, title, text, level, evidenceRequired, evidenceTypes, and validationRefs.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Negative ACs supported
acceptanceCriteria.text: Schema can represent negative assertions requiring negative evidence.

rollback.notes: Rollback only files owned by this workspace. Preserve ACCP reports.

instructions.text: Implement EvidenceLedger with typed evidence items and AC traceability.
Evidence confidence must be one of high, medium, or low.

acceptanceCriteria.title: EvidenceLedger implemented
acceptanceCriteria.text: EvidenceLedger has source, test, and evidence artifacts.

acceptanceCriteria.title: EvidenceLedger block path covered
acceptanceCriteria.text: EvidenceLedger includes at least one failure/blocking path test.

rollback.notes: Rollback only files owned by this workspace. Preserve ACCP reports.

acceptanceCriteria.title: Worker Report Contract block path covered
acceptanceCriteria.text: Worker Report Contract includes at least one failure/blocking path test.

rollback.notes: Rollback only files owned by this workspace. Preserve ACCP reports.

instructions.text: CompletionGate v2 is authoritative; worker self-report is claim-only.
CompletionGate v2 rejects missing evidence, stale attempt verdicts, validation shortcuts, and unexpected zero-tests-found output.

acceptanceCriteria.title: CompletionGate v2 implemented
acceptanceCriteria.text: CompletionGate v2 has source, test, and evidence artifacts.

acceptanceCriteria.title: CompletionGate v2 block path covered
acceptanceCriteria.text: CompletionGate v2 includes at least one failure/blocking path test.

rollback.notes: Rollback only files owned by this workspace. Preserve ACCP reports.

instructions.text: Production write and edit tool paths must call WriteGate or SmartMutationEngine.
